mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations ( reservation_no, guest_user_id, accommodation_id, room_type_id, guest_count, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, requested_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{reservationNo}, #{guestUserId}, #{accommodationId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{guestCount}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO reservation_nights ( reservation_id, stay_date, assigned_room_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{night.reservationId}, #{night.stayDate}, #{night.assignedRoomId}, #{night.createdAt}, #{night.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO reservation_status_history ( reservation_id, from_status, to_status, action_type, changed_by_user_id, reason_type, reason_text, changed_at ) VALUES ( #{reservationId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionType}, #{changedByUserId}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonText}, #{changedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE reservations SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')
